{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Bren
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Bren]] is an eight-year-old boy receiving his [[Sandviper body]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
